message:
feat(fcp-oauth): add AuthStyle for flexible client authentication

Add support for different OAuth client authentication methods as
required by various identity providers.

## New: AuthStyle Enum

```rust
pub enum AuthStyle {
    /// HTTP Basic Authentication (Authorization header)
    /// Encodes client_id:client_secret as Base64 in Authorization header
    Basic,

    /// Request body parameters (client_id/client_secret in POST body)
    /// Default for most OAuth providers
    #[default]
    Post,
}
```

Some providers (e.g., certain enterprise IdPs) require HTTP Basic
authentication instead of POST body parameters. This is specified
in RFC 6749 Section 2.3.1.

## OAuth2Config Changes

New field and builder method:
```rust
pub struct OAuth2Config {
    pub auth_style: AuthStyle,  // NEW
    // ...
}

impl OAuth2Config {
    pub const fn with_auth_style(mut self, style: AuthStyle) -> Self
}
```

## Token Request Refactoring

Removed duplicate client_id/client_secret insertion from individual
methods (exchange_code, client_credentials, refresh_token). Credentials
are now handled centrally based on auth_style:

- AuthStyle::Basic: Credentials in Authorization header
- AuthStyle::Post: Credentials in request body

This reduces code duplication and ensures consistent authentication
across all OAuth flows.

## pkce.rs

Minor formatting improvements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
